title: zornia prostrata
intro: Zornia prostrata, also known as running buffalo clover, is a perennial legume plant native to North America, characterized by its prostrate growth habit and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Zornia prostrata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to support various health benefits.
